content.speakerText: Do you know the baggage policy? We allow one large suitcase and one small carry-on.
content.speakerTextCn: 您知道行李规定吗？每人可免费托运一件大行李和一件小随身包。

options.text: Can I bring three carry-ons? I really need them.
What’s the size limit for the carry-on?
I’ll pay for an extra suitcase.
Do you have a locker for bags?

content.explanation: 正确答案询问了随身包的尺寸限制，这是行李政策中常见且相关的跟进问题。选项1试图增加随身包数量，但未回应政策确认；选项3提前讨论付费，与当前信息不匹配；选项4与行李政策无关，属于无关提问。

content.speakerText: The large suitcase can’t exceed 20 kg. Extra bags cost $10 each.
content.speakerTextCn: 大行李不得超过20公斤，额外行李每件10美元。

options.text: Is the fee per kilogram or per bag?
I’ll make sure my bag is under 20 kg. Thanks!
Can I split the weight between two bags?
Do you accept credit cards for baggage fees?

content.explanation: 正确答案表明乘客理解并承诺遵守重量限制，是符合语境的积极回应。选项1质疑收费单位，但对话已明确是‘per bag’；选项3涉及重量分配，属于政策外延伸；选项4询问支付方式，与当前信息无关。

content.speakerText: We allow one checked bag up to 23 kg and one personal item. Oversized bags require approval.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们允许一件最多23公斤的托运行李和一件随身物品。超大行李需提前申请。

options.text: Can I bring a large duffel bag as my personal item?
What counts as a personal item?
I’ll check my bag now to avoid extra fees.
Do you sell luggage scales at the airport?

content.explanation: 正确答案询问‘personal item’的定义，这是政策中模糊但关键的信息点。选项1假设大旅行袋可作为随身物品，可能违反规定；选项3是针对重��的反应，但未涉及‘personal item’的疑问；选项4是无关的实用建议，非政策确认。
